response.justification: Bogdan Szabo's resume does not align with the Principal Performance Architect role, which requires deep expertise in SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, AI accelerator optimization, and performance analysis for deep-learning workloads. His background is heavily focused on full-stack web, mobile, and embedded software development with limited exposure to hardware architecture, AI workloads, or system-level optimization. The educational path and work history do not meet the required qualifications for this principal-level hardware/performance role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack software development experience with diverse tech stacks (TypeScript, Node.js, Python, C++, Dlang)
Strong background in performance optimization for web and distributed systems (e.g., low-latency services, caching, high-throughput microservices)
Open-source contributions and leadership in community-driven projects (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective)
concerns: Lacks required expertise in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, or hardware-software co-design
No demonstrated experience with SIMD/MIMD architecture, GPU architecture, or deep neural network optimization
Educational background (Bachelor's in CS + Photography) does not meet the required qualifications (PhD/Master's + experience or equivalent hardware-focused experience)
